summary: Iteration 15 Testing Complete - All 22 backend tests passed, All frontend tests passed. MCX commodities (CRUDEOIL, GOLD, SILVER) added to trading instruments with correct exchange mapping. Option chain works for all 9 instruments (6 index + 3 MCX). Auto Refresh toggle and SIMULATED/LIVE badge working correctly.
test_credentials: None required - uses public preview URL
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 15 features fully tested. MCX commodities (CRUDEOIL, GOLD, SILVER) work correctly with exchange=MCX mapping. Option chain supports all 9 instruments. Auto refresh toggle in UI works. SIMULATED badge shows when Upstox not connected (expected). OI buildup alerts work for all instruments. Exchange mapping: NSE→NFO, BSE→BFO, MCX→MCX for order placement.
